mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS designing, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS deployed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS suspended, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS disabled FROM sys_flow_model m
m.del_flag = '0'
AND ( m.model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%') OR m.model_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%') )
AND ( m.category = #{category} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_flow_category fc JOIN sys_flow_category selected ON selected.id = #{category} OR selected.category_code = #{category} WHERE (fc.id = m.category OR fc.category_code = m.category) AND (fc.id = selected.id OR fc.ancestors LIKE CONCAT('%', selected.id, '/%')) ) )
AND m.create_by = #{createBy}
